title: amaryllis × annesleyana
intro: Amaryllis × annesleyana, also known as the Hippeastrum, is a hybrid plant species within the Amaryllidaceae family. It is known for its large, showy flowers and is often cultivated for its ornamental value. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Amaryllis × annesleyana can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, which may offer health benefits like anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
